label: Remove displace_refract — bypassing proved cleaner, shimmer handles surface
notes: displace_refract was warping a smooth radial gradient — produced blob distortion not legible water refraction. Specular shimmer layer does the surface job better. glsl_surface/blur_surface/null_surface chain kept (orphaned but useful for future shimmer input or surface-driven effects).

operations.before: displaceTOP: in0=null_sky, in1=null_surface, horzsource=red, vertsource=green, extend=mirror, displaceweight=0.065 (expression)
